reviews.comment:
Vinimos después de las 22:00 un solo empleado y cola para cargar, contraten empleados, algún franquero, facturan muchísimo, podrían esmerarse en brindar un mejor servicio. Son ACA.

(Translated by Google)
We came after 10 PM, there was only one employee and a line to load up. Hire more staff, maybe a shift worker. You're making a lot of money, you could really focus on providing better service. You're ACA.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCcE1PUnlBRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
The service is quite slow, but it's a tourist city and there were a lot of people in January.

reviews.comment:
La atención del personal es buena y los precios son los
Más bajos de la zona el combustible es bueno eso si casi siempre hay demoras por lo que conviene ir de mañana temprano o a la noche. Tienen la YPF aplicación para el descuento al cargar.

(Translated by Google)
The staff is attentive and the prices are the lowest in the area.
The fuel is good, but there are almost always delays, so it's best to go early in the morning or at night. They have the YPF app for discounts when filling up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCMlBEUEJREAE

reviews.comment:
La nafta en la costa, es muchiiiisimo más cara que es caba o gba. Suele haber cola ya qué hay un solo empleado…

(Translated by Google)
Gasoline on the coast is much more expensive than caba or gba. There's usually a line because there's only one attendant...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCa08zNXpRRRAB

reviews.comment:
De terror!! No solo en temporada, sino durante todo el año se hacen colas de más de 30 minutos para cargar nafta. Tienen 6 surtidores y con suerte tienen habilitados para la carga uno o dos. Y ni hablar que nunca tienen garrafas. Se abusan por el solo hecho que es la única YPF en la cuidad. Considerando que es un reclamo generalizado y constante, no entiendo porque el dueño de la estación no reformula la atención y presta mejor servicio.

(Translated by Google)
It's awful!! Not just during peak season, but year-round, there are lines of over 30 minutes to get gas. They have six pumps, and if you're lucky, only one or two are open. And don't even get me started on the fact that they never have propane tanks. They take advantage of the situation simply because it's the only YPF station in town. Considering this is a widespread and constant complaint, I don't understand why the station owner doesn't improve their service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCNzctUFV3EAE

Mala atención. Y te cobran por hacerte factura A. Y eso que pagué en egectivo. Ni hablar de lo lento que son atendiendo se hacen colas de 100mts

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. And they charge you for an invoice. Even though I paid in cash. Not to mention how slow they are; the lines are 100 meters long.
